b:T423a,<div class="question">
<p style="text-align: left;">The graph shows the effect of increasing light intensity on the rate of CO<sub>2</sub> uptake by a species of green plant maintained in conditions of constant temperature and CO<sub>2</sub> concentration.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align: center;">[Source: © International Baccalaureate Organization 2019]</p>
<p style="text-align: left;"> </p>
<p style="text-align: left;">Which statement is consistent with the graph?</p>
<p style="text-align: left;">A. Photosynthesis stops at high light intensity.</p>
<p style="text-align: left;">B. Rates of photosynthesis increase with temperature.</p>
<p style="text-align: left;">C. Cell respiration leads to net production of CO<sub>2</sub> at low light intensity.</p>
<p style="text-align: left;">D. There is a negative correlation between CO<sub>2</sub> uptake and light intensity.</p>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/2/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","2"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"19M.1.SL.TZ1.12"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","1"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"19M"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","2-9-photosynthesis"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>C</p>\n</div>"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>Many candidates (and some teachers commenting in feedback forms) chose answer A, but this is to confuse a plateau on the graph with a decrease to zero. Perhaps the term ‘rate’ was not understood and it was thought that the graph showed cumulative absorption of carbon dioxide. This is another question where more than straight factual recall is required.</p>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
